history.text: Colonised by Leopold II of Belgium appears in Democratic Republic of the Congo's historical record.

Democratic Republic of the Congo became independent from Belgium, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Democratic Republic of the Congo joined the United Nations, confirming broad international recognition.
Democratic Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Republic of Zaire introduced a new form of state rule.
First Congo War was a major conflict in Democratic Republic of the Congo's modern political history.
